mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_week_menu
idx, menu_date, content, type, update_dt, reg_dt, del_yn, user_id,
VALUES
#{idx}, DATE_FORMAT(#{menu_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{content}, #{type}, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(#{reg_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{del_yn}, #{user_id},
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
idx=#{idx}, menu_date=DATE_FORMAT(#{menu_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), content=#{content}, type=#{type}, update_dt=DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), '%Y-%m-%d'), reg_dt=DATE_FORMAT(#{reg_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d'), del_yn=#{del_yn}, user_id=#{user_id},
mapper.select: SELECT idx, DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as menu_date, content, type, del_yn, update_dt, reg_dt, user_id FROM tb_week_menu WHERE DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m') = CONCAT(#{year},'-',#{month}) AND type = #{type} AND del_yn = 'N'

SELECT idx, DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as menu_date, content, type, del_yn, update_dt, reg_dt, user_id FROM tb_week_menu WHERE DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{today} AND type = #{type} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_week_menu
idx, menu_date, end_date, content, type, reg_dt, del_yn, user_id, account_id,
VALUES
#{idx}, DATE_FORMAT(#{menu_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{content}, #{type}, DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), '%Y-%m-%d'), #{del_yn}, #{user_id}, #{account_id},
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
idx=#{idx}, menu_date=DATE_FORMAT(#{menu_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), end_date=DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), content=#{content}, type=#{type}, update_dt=DATE_FORMAT(CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), '%Y-%m-%d'), del_yn=#{del_yn}, user_id=#{user_id}, account_id=#{account_id},
mapper.select: SELECT idx, DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as menu_date, DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as end_date, content, type, del_yn, DATE_FORMAT(update_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') as update_dt, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') as reg_dt, user_id, account_id FROM tb_week_menu WHERE DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m') = CONCAT(#{year},'-',#{month}) AND del_yn = 'N' AND type != 1

SELECT a.account_id , a.account_name , adn.diner_date , ifnull(adn.total,0) as total FROM tb_account a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_account_diners_number adn ON adn.account_id = a.account_id AND adn.diner_year = #{year} AND adn.diner_month = #{month} AND a.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY a.account_id, diner_date ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_account_managerment_table ( account_id, year, month, living_estimate, living_estimate_ratio, basic_estimate, basic_estimate_ratio,
living_cost2, living_ratio2, basic_cost2, basic_ratio2, employ_cost2, employ_ratio2,
living_cost, living_ratio, basic_cost, basic_ratio, employ_cost, employ_ratio, daycare_cost, daycare_ratio, daycare_emp_cost, daycare_emp_ratio, payback_price, payback_ratio, duty_secure, duty_secure_ratio, food_process, food_trash_ratio, dishwasher, dishwasher_ratio, cesco, cesco_ratio, water_puri, water_ratio, utility_bills, utility_ratio, utility_bills_note, food_cost, food_ratio, etc_cost, etc_ratio, estimate_total, estimate_total_ratio, dispatch_cost, dispatch_ratio, person_cost, person_ratio, sales_total, sales_total_ratio, purchase_total, purchase_total_ratio, person_total, person_total_ratio, indirect_total, indirect_total_ratio, business_profit, business_profit_ratio, update_dt, update_id, event_cost, event_ratio, not_budget_cost, not_budget_ratio, etc_indirect_cost, etc_indirect_ratio, integrity_cost, integrity_ratio, return_cost, return_ratio ) VALUES ( #{account_id}, #{year}, #{month}, #{living_estimate}, #{living_estimate_ratio}, #{basic_estimate}, #{basic_estimate_ratio},
#{living_cost2}, #{living_ratio2}, #{basic_cost2}, #{basic_ratio2}, #{employ_cost2}, #{employ_ratio2},
#{living_cost}, #{living_ratio}, #{basic_cost}, #{basic_ratio}, #{employ_cost}, #{employ_ratio}, #{daycare_cost}, #{daycare_ratio}, #{daycare_emp_cost}, #{daycare_emp_ratio}, #{payback_price}, #{payback_ratio}, #{duty_secure}, #{duty_secure_ratio}, #{food_process}, #{food_trash_ratio}, #{dishwasher}, #{dishwasher_ratio}, #{cesco}, #{cesco_ratio}, #{water_puri}, #{water_ratio}, #{utility_bills}, #{utility_ratio}, #{utility_bills_note}, #{food_cost}, #{food_ratio}, #{etc_cost}, #{etc_ratio}, #{estimate_total}, #{estimate_total_ratio}, #{dispatch_cost}, #{dispatch_ratio}, #{person_cost}, #{person_ratio}, #{sales_total}, #{sales_total_ratio}, #{purchase_total}, #{purchase_total_ratio}, #{person_total}, #{person_total_ratio}, #{indirect_total}, #{indirect_total_ratio}, #{business_profit}, #{business_profit_ratio}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), #{update_id}, #{event_cost}, #{event_ratio}, #{not_budget_cost}, #{not_budget_ratio}, #{etc_indirect_cost}, #{etc_indirect_ratio}, #{integrity_cost}, #{integrity_ratio}, #{return_cost}, #{return_ratio} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
living_estimate = #{living_estimate},
living_estimate_ratio = #{living_estimate_ratio},
basic_estimate = #{basic_estimate},
basic_estimate_ratio = #{basic_estimate_ratio},
living_cost2 = #{living_cost2},
living_ratio2 = #{living_ratio2},
basic_cost2 = #{basic_cost2},
basic_ratio2 = #{basic_ratio2},
employ_cost2 = #{employ_cost2},
employ_ratio2 = #{employ_ratio2},

basic_cost = #{basic_cost},
basic_ratio = #{basic_ratio},
employ_cost = #{employ_cost},
employ_ratio = #{employ_ratio},
daycare_cost = #{daycare_cost},
daycare_ratio = #{daycare_ratio},
daycare_emp_cost = #{daycare_emp_cost},
daycare_emp_ratio = #{daycare_emp_ratio},
payback_price = #{payback_price},
payback_ratio = #{payback_ratio},
duty_secure = #{duty_secure},
duty_secure_ratio = #{duty_secure_ratio},
food_process = #{food_process},
food_trash_ratio = #{food_trash_ratio},
dishwasher = #{dishwasher},
dishwasher_ratio = #{dishwasher_ratio},
cesco = #{cesco},
cesco_ratio = #{cesco_ratio},
water_puri = #{water_puri},
water_ratio = #{water_ratio},
utility_bills = #{utility_bills},
utility_ratio = #{utility_ratio},
utility_bills_note = #{utility_bills_note},
food_cost = #{food_cost},
food_ratio = #{food_ratio},
etc_cost = #{etc_cost},
etc_ratio = #{etc_ratio},
estimate_total = #{estimate_total},
estimate_total_ratio = #{estimate_total_ratio},
dispatch_cost = #{dispatch_cost},
dispatch_ratio = #{dispatch_ratio},
person_cost = #{person_cost},
person_ratio = #{person_ratio},

sales_total_ratio = #{sales_total_ratio},
purchase_total = #{purchase_total},
purchase_total_ratio = #{purchase_total_ratio},
person_total = #{person_total},

indirect_total = #{indirect_total},
indirect_total_ratio = #{indirect_total_ratio},
business_profit = #{business_profit},
business_profit_ratio = #{business_profit_ratio},
update_dt = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), update_id = #{update_id},
event_cost = #{event_cost},
event_ratio = #{event_ratio},
not_budget_cost = #{not_budget_cost},
not_budget_ratio = #{not_budget_ratio},

INSERT INTO tb_account_managerment_table ( account_id, year, month, person_cost, update_dt, update_id ) VALUES ( #{account_id}, #{year}, #{month}, #{person_cost}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), #{update_id} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE person_cost = #{person_cost}, update_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), update_id = #{update_id}

INSERT INTO tb_account_managerment_table_person_history ( account_id, year, month, mod_id, mod_dt, org_price, mod_price ) VALUES ( #{account_id}, #{year}, #{month}, #{mod_id}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), #{org_price}, #{mod_price} )

choose.when:
SELECT 'TOTAL' AS account_id, year, month, -- [1. 식수 추정치 및 비율] living_estimate, basic_estimate, (living_estimate + basic_estimate) AS estimate_total, ROUND(IFNULL(living_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL((living_estimate + basic_estimate) / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS estimate_total_ratio,
-- [2. 매출 항목 및 비율 (Sales)] living_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio, basic_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio, employ_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio,
living_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio2, basic_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio2, employ_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio2,
daycare_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_ratio, daycare_emp_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_emp_ratio, integrity_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS integrity_ratio, payback_price, ROUND(IFNULL(payback_price / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS payback_ratio, return_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(return_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS return_ratio, sales_total,
ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(return_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- ROUND(IFNULL(sales_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- [3. 매입 항목 및 비율 (Purchase)] food_process, ROUND(IFNULL(food_process / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_trash_ratio, dishwasher, ROUND(IFNULL(dishwasher / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dishwasher_ratio, cesco, ROUND(IFNULL(cesco / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS cesco_ratio, water_puri, ROUND(IFNULL(water_puri / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS water_ratio, food_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(food_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_ratio, etc_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_ratio, event_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(event_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS event_ratio, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio,
purchase_total, ROUND(IFNULL(purchase_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS purchase_total_ratio,
-- [4. 인건비 항목 및 비율 (Labor)] person_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(person_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_ratio, dispatch_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(dispatch_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dispatch_ratio, person_total, ROUND(IFNULL(person_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_total_ratio,
-- [5. 간접비 및 기타 (Indirect)] utility_bills, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(utility_bills / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS utility_ratio, duty_secure, ROUND(IFNULL(duty_secure / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS duty_secure_ratio, indirect_total, ROUND(IFNULL(indirect_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS indirect_total_ratio,
-- [6. 영업이익 (Profit)] business_profit, ROUND(IFNULL(business_profit / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS business_profit_ratio, total_business_profit, ROUND(IFNULL(total_business_profit / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS total_business_profit_ratio,
-- [7. 기존 기타 항목들] utility_bills_note, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, update_dt
FROM ( SELECT year, month, -- 매출 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) AS living_cost, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) AS basic_cost, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost, 0)) AS employ_cost,
SUM(IFNULL(living_cost2, 0)) AS living_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost2, 0)) AS basic_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost2, 0)) AS employ_cost2,
SUM(IFNULL(daycare_cost, 0)) AS daycare_cost, SUM(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost, 0)) AS daycare_emp_cost, SUM(IFNULL(payback_price, 0)) AS payback_price, SUM(IFNULL(integrity_cost, 0)) AS integrity_cost, SUM(IFNULL(return_cost, 0)) AS return_cost, -- 매입 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(food_process, 0)) AS food_process, SUM(IFNULL(dishwasher, 0)) AS dishwasher, SUM(IFNULL(cesco, 0)) AS cesco, SUM(IFNULL(water_puri, 0)) AS water_puri, SUM(IFNULL(food_cost, 0)) AS food_cost, SUM(IFNULL(etc_cost, 0)) AS etc_cost, SUM(IFNULL(event_cost, 0)) AS event_cost, SUM(IFNULL(not_budget_cost, 0)) AS not_budget_cost, -- 인건비 및 기타 SUM(IFNULL(person_cost, 0)) AS person_cost, SUM(IFNULL(dispatch_cost, 0)) AS dispatch_cost, SUM(IFNULL(utility_bills, 0)) AS utility_bills, SUM(IFNULL(duty_secure, 0)) AS duty_secure, SUM(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost, 0)) AS etc_indirect_cost, SUM(IFNULL(person_total, 0)) AS person_total, SUM(IFNULL(indirect_total, 0)) AS indirect_total, SUM(IFNULL(business_profit, 0)) AS business_profit, SUM(IFNULL(total_business_profit, 0)) AS total_business_profit,
SUM(IFNULL(sales_total, 0)) AS sales_total, SUM(IFNULL(purchase_total, 0)) AS purchase_total,
-- 식수 추정치 로직 (필요시 내부 변수/상수 적용) ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS living_estimate, ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS basic_estimate,
MAX(utility_bills_note) AS utility_bills_note, MAX(DATE_FORMAT(update_dt, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS update_dt FROM the_full.tb_account_managerment_table WHERE year = #{year}
AND month = #{month}
AND account_id not in ( 20260122065002, -- 한결 주간보호 20260122071337, -- 어르신사랑 주간보호 20260122071857, -- 청평설악 주간보호 20260122072114, -- 늘사랑(부천) 주간보호 20260122072245, -- 지안 주간보호 20260122072732, -- 사랑의 주간보호 20260219024021, -- 사랑복지센터 20260122072529 -- 인천강남 -- 20260210044430, KDB생명 데이케어센터 고양 -- 20250819193617, 참인지재활주간보호 -- 20250819193613, 대교뉴이프(마음고향2호점) -- 20250819193535 마음고향 )
AND account_id IN (${account_ids})
GROUP BY year, month ) AS aggregated_data ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC

SELECT T.account_id, T.account_name, year, month, -- [1. 식수 추정치 및 비율] living_estimate, basic_estimate, (living_estimate + basic_estimate) AS estimate_total, ROUND(IFNULL(living_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL((living_estimate + basic_estimate) / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS estimate_total_ratio,
-- [2. 매출 항목 및 비율 (Sales)] living_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio, basic_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio, employ_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio,
living_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio2, basic_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio2, employ_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio2,
daycare_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_ratio, daycare_emp_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_emp_ratio, integrity_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS integrity_ratio, payback_price, ROUND(IFNULL(payback_price / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS payback_ratio, sales_total,
ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- ROUND(IFNULL(sales_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- [3. 매입 항목 및 비율 (Purchase)] food_process, ROUND(IFNULL(food_process / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_trash_ratio, dishwasher, ROUND(IFNULL(dishwasher / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dishwasher_ratio, cesco, ROUND(IFNULL(cesco / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS cesco_ratio, water_puri, ROUND(IFNULL(water_puri / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS water_ratio, food_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(food_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_ratio, etc_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_ratio, event_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(event_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS event_ratio, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio,
purchase_total, ROUND(IFNULL(purchase_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS purchase_total_ratio,
-- [4. 인건비 항목 및 비율 (Labor)] person_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(person_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_ratio, dispatch_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(dispatch_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dispatch_ratio, person_total, ROUND(IFNULL(person_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_total_ratio,
-- [5. 간접비 및 기타 (Indirect)] utility_bills, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(utility_bills / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS utility_ratio, duty_secure, ROUND(IFNULL(duty_secure / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS duty_secure_ratio, indirect_total, ROUND(IFNULL(indirect_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS indirect_total_ratio,
-- [6. 영업이익 (Profit)] business_profit, ROUND(IFNULL(business_profit / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS business_profit_ratio, total_business_profit, ROUND(IFNULL(total_business_profit / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS total_business_profit_ratio,
-- [7. 기존 기타 항목들] utility_bills_note, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, update_dt
FROM ( SELECT account_id, year, month, -- 매출 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(living_cost2, 0)) AS living_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost2, 0)) AS basic_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost2, 0)) AS employ_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) AS living_cost, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) AS basic_cost, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost, 0)) AS employ_cost, SUM(IFNULL(daycare_cost, 0)) AS daycare_cost, SUM(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost, 0)) AS daycare_emp_cost, SUM(IFNULL(payback_price, 0)) AS payback_price, SUM(IFNULL(integrity_cost, 0)) AS integrity_cost, -- 매입 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(food_process, 0)) AS food_process, SUM(IFNULL(dishwasher, 0)) AS dishwasher, SUM(IFNULL(cesco, 0)) AS cesco, SUM(IFNULL(water_puri, 0)) AS water_puri, SUM(IFNULL(food_cost, 0)) AS food_cost, SUM(IFNULL(etc_cost, 0)) AS etc_cost, SUM(IFNULL(event_cost, 0)) AS event_cost, SUM(IFNULL(not_budget_cost, 0)) AS not_budget_cost, -- 인건비 및 기타 SUM(IFNULL(person_cost, 0)) AS person_cost, SUM(IFNULL(dispatch_cost, 0)) AS dispatch_cost, SUM(IFNULL(utility_bills, 0)) AS utility_bills, SUM(IFNULL(duty_secure, 0)) AS duty_secure, SUM(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost, 0)) AS etc_indirect_cost, SUM(IFNULL(person_total, 0)) AS person_total, SUM(IFNULL(indirect_total, 0)) AS indirect_total, SUM(IFNULL(business_profit, 0)) AS business_profit, SUM(IFNULL(total_business_profit, 0)) AS total_business_profit,
SUM(IFNULL(sales_total, 0)) AS sales_total, SUM(IFNULL(purchase_total, 0)) AS purchase_total,
-- 식수 추정치 로직 (필요시 내부 변수/상수 적용) ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS living_estimate, ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS basic_estimate,
MAX(utility_bills_note) AS utility_bills_note, MAX(DATE_FORMAT(update_dt, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS update_dt FROM the_full.tb_account_managerment_table WHERE year = #{year}
AND month = #{month}
GROUP BY account_id, year, month ) AS aggregated_data JOIN tb_account T ON T.account_id = aggregated_data.account_id WHERE T.account_id not in ( 20260122065002, -- 한결 주간보호 20260122071337, -- 어르신사랑 주간보호 20260122071857, -- 청평설악 주간보호 20260122072114, -- 늘사랑(부천) 주간보호 20260122072245, -- 지안 주간보호 20260122072732, -- 사랑의 주간보호 20260219024021, -- 사랑복지센터 20260122072529 -- 인천강남 -- 20260210044430, KDB생명 데이케어센터 고양 -- 20250819193617, 참인지재활주간보호 -- 20250819193613, 대교뉴이프(마음고향2호점) -- 20250819193535 마음고향 ) ORDER BY T.account_id ASC, year ASC, month ASC

mapper.select:
SELECT T.account_id, T.account_name, -- year, -- month, -- [1. 식수 추정치 및 비율] living_estimate, basic_estimate, (living_estimate + basic_estimate) AS estimate_total, ROUND(IFNULL(living_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL((living_estimate + basic_estimate) / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS estimate_total_ratio,
-- [2. 매출 항목 및 비율 (Sales)] living_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio2, basic_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio2, employ_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio2,
living_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio, basic_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio, employ_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio, daycare_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_ratio, daycare_emp_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_emp_ratio, integrity_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS integrity_ratio, payback_price, ROUND(IFNULL(payback_price / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS payback_ratio, sales_total,
ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- ROUND(IFNULL(sales_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- [3. 매입 항목 및 비율 (Purchase)] food_process, ROUND(IFNULL(food_process / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_trash_ratio, dishwasher, ROUND(IFNULL(dishwasher / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dishwasher_ratio, cesco, ROUND(IFNULL(cesco / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS cesco_ratio, water_puri, ROUND(IFNULL(water_puri / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS water_ratio, food_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(food_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_ratio, etc_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_ratio, event_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(event_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS event_ratio, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio,
purchase_total, ROUND(IFNULL(purchase_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS purchase_total_ratio,
-- [4. 인건비 항목 및 비율 (Labor)] person_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(person_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_ratio, dispatch_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(dispatch_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dispatch_ratio, person_total, ROUND(IFNULL(person_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_total_ratio,
-- [5. 간접비 및 기타 (Indirect)] utility_bills, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(utility_bills / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS utility_ratio, duty_secure, ROUND(IFNULL(duty_secure / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS duty_secure_ratio, indirect_total, ROUND(IFNULL(indirect_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS indirect_total_ratio,
-- [6. 영업이익 (Profit)] business_profit, ROUND(IFNULL(business_profit / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS business_profit_ratio, total_business_profit, ROUND(IFNULL(total_business_profit / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS total_business_profit_ratio,
-- [7. 기존 기타 항목들] utility_bills_note, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, update_dt
FROM ( SELECT account_id, year, -- 매출 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(living_cost2, 0)) AS living_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost2, 0)) AS basic_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost2, 0)) AS employ_cost2,
SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) AS living_cost, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) AS basic_cost, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost, 0)) AS employ_cost, SUM(IFNULL(daycare_cost, 0)) AS daycare_cost, SUM(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost, 0)) AS daycare_emp_cost, SUM(IFNULL(payback_price, 0)) AS payback_price, SUM(IFNULL(integrity_cost, 0)) AS integrity_cost, -- 매입 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(food_process, 0)) AS food_process, SUM(IFNULL(dishwasher, 0)) AS dishwasher, SUM(IFNULL(cesco, 0)) AS cesco, SUM(IFNULL(water_puri, 0)) AS water_puri, SUM(IFNULL(food_cost, 0)) AS food_cost, SUM(IFNULL(etc_cost, 0)) AS etc_cost, SUM(IFNULL(event_cost, 0)) AS event_cost, SUM(IFNULL(not_budget_cost, 0)) AS not_budget_cost, -- 인건비 및 기타 SUM(IFNULL(person_cost, 0)) AS person_cost, SUM(IFNULL(dispatch_cost, 0)) AS dispatch_cost, SUM(IFNULL(utility_bills, 0)) AS utility_bills, SUM(IFNULL(duty_secure, 0)) AS duty_secure, SUM(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost, 0)) AS etc_indirect_cost, SUM(IFNULL(person_total, 0)) AS person_total, SUM(IFNULL(indirect_total, 0)) AS indirect_total, SUM(IFNULL(business_profit, 0)) AS business_profit, SUM(IFNULL(total_business_profit, 0)) AS total_business_profit,
SUM(IFNULL(sales_total, 0)) AS sales_total, SUM(IFNULL(purchase_total, 0)) AS purchase_total,
-- 식수 추정치 로직 (필요시 내부 변수/상수 적용) ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS living_estimate, ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS basic_estimate,
MAX(utility_bills_note) AS utility_bills_note, MAX(DATE_FORMAT(update_dt, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS update_dt FROM the_full.tb_account_managerment_table WHERE year = #{year}
AND month = #{month}
GROUP BY account_id, year ) AS aggregated_data JOIN tb_account T ON T.account_id = aggregated_data.account_id WHERE T.account_id not in ( 20260122065002, -- 한결 주간보호 20260122071337, -- 어르신사랑 주간보호 20260122071857, -- 청평설악 주간보호 20260122072114, -- 늘사랑(부천) 주간보호 20260122072245, -- 지안 주간보호 20260122072732, -- 사랑의 주간보호 20260219024021, -- 사랑복지센터 20260122072529 -- 인천강남 -- 20260210044430, KDB생명 데이케어센터 고양 -- 20250819193617, 참인지재활주간보호 -- 20250819193613, 대교뉴이프(마음고향2호점) -- 20250819193535 마음고향 ) ORDER BY T.account_id ASC, year ASC

SELECT account_id, year, month, living_estimate, living_estimate_ratio, basic_estimate, basic_estimate_ratio,
living_cost2, living_ratio2, basic_cost2, basic_ratio2, employ_cost2, employ_ratio2,
living_cost, living_ratio, basic_cost, basic_ratio, employ_cost, employ_ratio, daycare_cost, daycare_ratio, daycare_emp_cost, daycare_emp_ratio, payback_price, payback_ratio, duty_secure, duty_secure_ratio, food_process, food_trash_ratio, dishwasher, dishwasher_ratio, cesco, cesco_ratio, water_puri, water_ratio, utility_bills, utility_ratio, food_cost, food_ratio, etc_cost, etc_ratio, estimate_total, estimate_total_ratio, dispatch_cost, dispatch_ratio, person_cost, person_ratio, sales_total, sales_total_ratio, purchase_total, purchase_total_ratio, person_total, person_total_ratio, indirect_total, indirect_total_ratio, business_profit, business_profit_ratio, update_dt FROM the_full.tb_account_managerment_table AND account_id not in ( 20260122065002, -- 한결 주간보호 20260122071337, -- 어르신사랑 주간보호 20260122071857, -- 청평설악 주간보호 20260122072114, -- 늘사랑(부천) 주간보호 20260122072245, -- 지안 주간보호 20260122072732, -- 사랑의 주간보호 20260219024021, -- 사랑복지센터 20260122072529 -- 인천강남 -- 20260210044430, KDB생명 데이케어센터 고양 -- 20250819193617, 참인지재활주간보호 -- 20250819193613, 대교뉴이프(마음고향2호점) -- 20250819193535 마음고향 )

SELECT doc_id, doc_type, large_type, middle_type, small_type, doc_name, approval_position FROM tb_electronic_payment_type WHERE del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY large_type ASC, middle_type ASC, small_type ASC, doc_type ASC

SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, doc_type, user_id, charge_sign, tm_sign, payer_sign, ceo_sign, status, tm_user, payer_user, ceo_user, department, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ( payment_id, draft_dt, start_dt, doc_type, department, status, retention_dt, access_level, user_id, charge_sign, tm_user, tm_sign, payer_user, payer_sign, ceo_user, ceo_sign, reg_dt, reg_user_id ) VALUES ( #{payment_id}, COALESCE( STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ), COALESCE( STR_TO_DATE(#{start_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{start_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ), #{doc_type}, #{department}, #{status}, #{retention_dt}, #{access_level}, #{user_id}, #{charge_sign}, #{tm_user}, #{tm_sign}, #{payer_user}, #{payer_sign}, #{ceo_user}, #{ceo_sign}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), #{reg_user_id} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE draft_dt = COALESCE( STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ), start_dt = COALESCE( STR_TO_DATE(#{start_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{start_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ), doc_type = #{doc_type}, department = #{department}, status = #{status}, retention_dt = #{retention_dt}, access_level = #{access_level}, user_id = #{user_id}, charge_sign = #{charge_sign}, tm_user = #{tm_user}, tm_sign = #{tm_sign}, payer_user = #{payer_user}, payer_sign = #{payer_sign}, ceo_user = #{ceo_user}, ceo_sign = #{ceo_sign}, reg_user_id = #{reg_user_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ep.payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(ep.draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(ep.start_dt, ep.draft_dt), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS start_dt, ep.doc_type, IFNULL(ept.approval_position, -1) AS approval_position, ep.department, ep.status, ep.retention_dt, ep.access_level, ep.user_id, ep.reg_user_id, ep.charge_sign, ep.tm_user, ep.tm_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.tm_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS tm_dt, ep.payer_user, ep.payer_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.payer_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS payer_dt, ep.ceo_user, ep.ceo_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.ceo_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ceo_dt, CASE WHEN IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(ep.ceo_sign, '') = '3' THEN '반려' WHEN (IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ep.payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ep.ceo_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.ceo_sign, '') = '4') THEN '승인완료' WHEN IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') != '' AND IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN CASE WHEN IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '2' THEN '검토중(팀장)' ELSE '결재대기(팀장)' END WHEN IFNULL(ep.payer_user, '') != '' AND (IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN CASE WHEN IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') = '2' THEN '검토중(결재자)' ELSE '결재대기(결재자)' END WHEN IFNULL(ep.ceo_user, '') != '' AND (IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ep.payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ep.ceo_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN CASE WHEN IFNULL(ep.ceo_sign, '') = '2' THEN '검토중(대표)' ELSE '결재대기(대표)' END ELSE '결재대기(팀장)' END AS progress_status_text, CASE WHEN ep.reg_user_id = #{user_id} THEN 'reg' WHEN ep.tm_user = #{user_id} THEN 'tm' WHEN ep.ceo_user = #{user_id} THEN 'ceo' WHEN ep.payer_user = #{user_id} THEN 'payer' ELSE '' END AS viewer_role, CASE WHEN ep.tm_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN 'Y' WHEN ep.payer_user = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN 'Y' WHEN ep.ceo_user = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ep.payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ep.ceo_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS can_action FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep LEFT JOIN tb_electronic_payment_type ept ON CAST(ept.doc_type AS CHAR) = CAST(ep.doc_type AS CHAR) AND IFNULL(ept.del_yn, 'N') = 'N'
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_user lu WHERE lu.user_id = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(lu.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND ( lu.position = 0 OR ep.reg_user_id = #{user_id} OR ep.tm_user = #{user_id} OR ep.ceo_user = #{user_id} OR ep.payer_user = #{user_id} OR (lu.position = 1 AND lu.department = ep.department) OR ( #{user_id} = 'iy1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_headoffice_purchase_request prx WHERE prx.payment_id = ep.payment_id ) ) ) )
WHERE 1 = 0
ORDER BY ep.draft_dt DESC, ep.payment_id DESC

SELECT ep.payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(ep.draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(ep.start_dt, ep.draft_dt), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS start_dt, ep.doc_type, IFNULL(ept.approval_position, -1) AS approval_position, ep.department, ep.status, ep.retention_dt, ep.access_level, ep.user_id, ep.reg_user_id, ep.charge_sign, ep.tm_user, ep.tm_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.tm_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS tm_dt, ep.payer_user, ep.payer_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.payer_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS payer_dt, ep.ceo_user, ep.ceo_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.ceo_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ceo_dt FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep LEFT JOIN tb_electronic_payment_type ept ON CAST(ept.doc_type AS CHAR) = CAST(ep.doc_type AS CHAR) AND IFNULL(ept.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' WHERE ep.payment_id = #{payment_id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_user lu WHERE lu.user_id = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(lu.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND ( lu.position = 0 OR ep.reg_user_id = #{user_id} OR ep.tm_user = #{user_id} OR ep.ceo_user = #{user_id} OR ep.payer_user = #{user_id} OR (lu.position = 1 AND lu.department = ep.department) OR ( #{user_id} = 'iy1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_headoffice_purchase_request prx WHERE prx.payment_id = ep.payment_id ) ) ) )
AND 1 = 0
LIMIT 1

SELECT R.idx, R.title, R.place, R.item_name, R.qty, R.price, R.use_note, R.use_name, R.link, R.note, R.buy_yn, R.payment_note, R.content, R.amount, R.tax, R.total, R.account_number, R.biz_no, R.account_name, R.payment_type, R.payment_type_detail, R.request_dt FROM (
SELECT pr.idx, '' AS title, '' AS place, pr.item_name, pr.qty, pr.price, pr.use_note, pr.use_name, pr.link, pr.note, IFNULL(pr.buy_yn, 'N') AS buy_yn, pr.payment_note, '' AS content, NULL AS amount, NULL AS tax, NULL AS total, NULL AS account_number, NULL AS biz_no, NULL AS account_name, NULL AS payment_type, NULL AS payment_type_detail, NULL AS request_dt FROM tb_headoffice_purchase_request pr JOIN tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep ON ep.payment_id = pr.payment_id WHERE pr.payment_id = #{payment_id}
UNION ALL
SELECT IFNULL(d.idx, 1) AS idx, d.title AS title, '' AS place, d.title AS item_name, NULL AS qty, NULL AS price, d.details AS use_note, '' AS use_name, '' AS link, d.note AS note, '' AS buy_yn, '' AS payment_note, d.details AS content, NULL AS amount, NULL AS tax, NULL AS total, NULL AS account_number, NULL AS biz_no, NULL AS account_name, NULL AS payment_type, NULL AS payment_type_detail, NULL AS request_dt FROM tb_headoffice_draft d JOIN tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep ON ep.payment_id = d.payment_id WHERE d.payment_id = #{payment_id}
UNION ALL
SELECT IFNULL(pd.idx, 1) AS idx, pd.title AS title, pd.place AS place, pd.item_name AS item_name, pd.qty AS qty, pd.price AS price, pd.use_note AS use_note, pd.use_name AS use_name, '' AS link, '' AS note, '' AS buy_yn, '' AS payment_note, pd.content AS content, pd.amount AS amount, pd.tax AS tax, pd.total AS total, pd.account_number AS account_number, pd.biz_no AS biz_no, pd.account_name AS account_name, pd.payment_type AS payment_type, pd.payment_type_detail AS payment_type_detail, DATE_FORMAT(pd.request_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS request_dt FROM tb_headoffice_payment_doc pd JOIN tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep ON ep.payment_id = pd.payment_id WHERE pd.payment_id = #{payment_id} ) R WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep JOIN tb_user lu ON lu.user_id = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(lu.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' WHERE ep.payment_id = #{payment_id} AND ( lu.position = 0 OR ep.reg_user_id = #{user_id} OR ep.tm_user = #{user_id} OR ep.ceo_user = #{user_id} OR ep.payer_user = #{user_id} OR (lu.position = 1 AND lu.department = ep.department) OR ( #{user_id} = 'iy1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_headoffice_purchase_request prx WHERE prx.payment_id = ep.payment_id ) ) ) )
AND 1 = 0
ORDER BY R.idx ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_headoffice_electronic_payment SET tm_sign = #{action_status}, tm_dt = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), reg_read_dt = NULL, status = CASE WHEN #{action_status} = '3' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '3' THEN 3 WHEN #{action_status} = '4' AND (IFNULL(ceo_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4') THEN 4 WHEN #{action_status} = '4' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '4' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END WHERE payment_id = #{payment_id} AND tm_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(tm_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')

UPDATE tb_headoffice_electronic_payment SET ceo_sign = #{action_status}, ceo_dt = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), reg_read_dt = NULL, tm_read_dt = NULL, payer_read_dt = NULL, status = CASE WHEN IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '3' OR #{action_status} = '3' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '3' THEN 3 WHEN (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ceo_user, '') = '' OR #{action_status} = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4') THEN 4 WHEN IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4' OR #{action_status} = '4' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END WHERE payment_id = #{payment_id} AND ceo_user = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')

UPDATE tb_headoffice_electronic_payment SET payer_sign = #{action_status}, payer_dt = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), reg_read_dt = NULL, tm_read_dt = NULL, status = CASE WHEN IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '3' OR #{action_status} = '3' THEN 3 WHEN (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ceo_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR #{action_status} = '4') THEN 4 WHEN IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '4' OR #{action_status} = '4' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END WHERE payment_id = #{payment_id} AND payer_user = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(payer_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '결재요청' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 팀장 결재가 필요합니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE tm_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(tm_user, '') != '' AND IFNULL(tm_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '결재요청' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 결재자 결재가 필요합니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE payer_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(payer_user, '') != '' AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(payer_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '결재요청' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 대표 결재가 필요합니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE ceo_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(ceo_user, '') != '' AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '승인' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 결재가 승인되었습니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE reg_user_id = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ceo_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '4') AND reg_read_dt IS NULL
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '반려' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 결재가 반려되었습니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE reg_user_id = #{user_id} AND ( IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '3' ) AND reg_read_dt IS NULL
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '반려' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 결재가 반려되었습니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE tm_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(tm_user, '') != '' AND ( IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '3' ) AND tm_read_dt IS NULL
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '반려' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 결재가 반려되었습니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE payer_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(payer_user, '') != '' AND IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '3' AND payer_read_dt IS NULL ) AS N ORDER BY N.draft_dt DESC, N.payment_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_headoffice_electronic_payment SET reg_read_dt = CASE WHEN reg_user_id = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} IN ('승인', '반려') THEN CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00') ELSE reg_read_dt END, tm_read_dt = CASE WHEN tm_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '반려' THEN CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00') ELSE tm_read_dt END, payer_read_dt = CASE WHEN payer_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '반려' THEN CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00') ELSE payer_read_dt END WHERE payment_id = #{payment_id} AND ( (reg_user_id = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} IN ('승인', '반려')) OR (tm_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '반려') OR (payer_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '반려') )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_headoffice_draft ( payment_id, title, details, note ) VALUES ( #{payment_id}, #{title}, #{details}, #{note} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = #{title}, details = #{details}, note = #{note}

INSERT INTO tb_headoffice_payment_doc ( payment_id, title, place, use_note, use_name, total, item_name, content, qty, price, amount, tax, payment_type, payment_type_detail, request_dt, account_number, biz_no, account_name ) VALUES ( #{payment_id}, #{title}, #{place}, #{use_note}, #{use_name}, #{total}, #{item_name}, #{content}, #{qty}, #{price}, #{amount}, #{tax}, #{payment_type}, #{payment_type_detail}, COALESCE( STR_TO_DATE(#{request_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{request_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE(#{request_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d') ), #{account_number}, #{biz_no}, #{account_name} )
INSERT INTO tb_electronic_payment_file_management ( payment_id, image_order, image_path, image_name ) VALUES ( #{payment_id}, #{image_order}, #{image_path}, #{image_name} )

INSERT INTO tb_headoffice_purchase_request ( payment_id, item_name, qty, price, use_note, use_name, link, note, buy_yn, payment_note ) VALUES
( #{item.payment_id}, #{item.item_name}, #{item.qty}, #{item.price}, #{item.use_note}, #{item.use_name}, #{item.link}, #{item.note}, #{item.buy_yn}, #{item.payment_note} )
mapper.select: SELECT department, CASE WHEN department = 0 THEN '대표실' WHEN department = 2 THEN '회계팀' WHEN department = 3 THEN '인사팀' WHEN department = 4 THEN '영업팀' WHEN department = 5 THEN '운영팀' ELSE '개발팀' END AS dept_name FROM tb_user WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND department not in (1,7) GROUP BY department ORDER BY department ASC;
SELECT user_id, user_name, department, position, join_dt, user_type FROM tb_user WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND department = #{department} ORDER BY position ASC

SELECT n.idx, n.title, n.large_type, n.middle_type, CASE n.large_type WHEN 1 THEN '회사소식' WHEN 2 THEN '업무표준화' WHEN 3 THEN '커뮤니티' WHEN 4 THEN '업무협조' WHEN 5 THEN '영업&마케팅' ELSE '' END AS large_type_nm, CASE n.middle_type WHEN 11 THEN '전사공지' WHEN 12 THEN '회사규정' WHEN 13 THEN '계정관리' WHEN 21 THEN '본사회의록' WHEN 22 THEN '내부사용양식' WHEN 23 THEN '오리엔테이션' WHEN 31 THEN '아이디어 공유' WHEN 32 THEN '업무노하우' WHEN 33 THEN '지식정보공유' WHEN 41 THEN '기획' WHEN 42 THEN '관리' WHEN 43 THEN '영업' WHEN 51 THEN '신규영업정보' WHEN 52 THEN '마케팅활동' ELSE '' END AS middle_type_nm, DATE_FORMAT(n.expire_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') AS expire_dt, n.user_id, u.user_name, CASE WHEN u.position = 0 THEN '대표' WHEN u.position = 1 THEN '팀장' WHEN u.position = 2 THEN '파트장' WHEN u.position BETWEEN 3 AND 7 THEN '매니저' WHEN u.position = 8 THEN '영양사' ELSE '' END AS position_name, DATE_FORMAT(n.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_headoffice_notice_file f WHERE f.notice_idx = n.idx) AS file_cnt FROM tb_headoffice_notice n JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = n.user_id WHERE n.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY n.idx DESC

SELECT n.idx, n.title, n.content, n.large_type, n.middle_type, CASE n.large_type WHEN 1 THEN '회사소식' WHEN 2 THEN '업무표준화' WHEN 3 THEN '커뮤니티' WHEN 4 THEN '업무협조' WHEN 5 THEN '영업&마케팅' ELSE '' END AS large_type_nm, CASE n.middle_type WHEN 11 THEN '전사공지' WHEN 12 THEN '회사규정' WHEN 13 THEN '계정관리' WHEN 21 THEN '본사회의록' WHEN 22 THEN '내부사용양식' WHEN 23 THEN '오리엔테이션' WHEN 31 THEN '아이디어 공유' WHEN 32 THEN '업무노하우' WHEN 33 THEN '지식정보공유' WHEN 41 THEN '기획' WHEN 42 THEN '관리' WHEN 43 THEN '영업' WHEN 51 THEN '신규영업정보' WHEN 52 THEN '마케팅활동' ELSE '' END AS middle_type_nm, DATE_FORMAT(n.expire_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') AS expire_dt, n.user_id, u.user_name, CASE WHEN u.position = 0 THEN '대표' WHEN u.position = 1 THEN '팀장' WHEN u.position = 2 THEN '파트장' WHEN u.position BETWEEN 3 AND 7 THEN '매니저' WHEN u.position = 8 THEN '영양사' ELSE '' END AS position_name, DATE_FORMAT(n.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_headoffice_notice n JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = n.user_id WHERE n.idx = #{idx} AND n.del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_headoffice_notice
idx, title, content, large_type, middle_type, expire_dt, user_id, reg_dt, update_dt, del_yn,
VALUES
#{idx}, #{title}, #{content}, #{large_type}, #{middle_type}, STR_TO_DATE(#{expire_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{user_id}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), 'N',
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
title=#{title}, content=#{content}, large_type=#{large_type}, middle_type=#{middle_type}, expire_dt=DATE_FORMAT(#{expire_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d'), update_dt=DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR),
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_headoffice_notice SET del_yn = 'Y', update_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) WHERE idx = #{idx}
mapper.select: SELECT bc.idx, DATE_FORMAT(bc.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS start_date, DATE_FORMAT(bc.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS end_date, bc.content, bc.type, bc.team_code, bc.del_yn, bc.update_dt, DATE_FORMAT(bc.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') AS reg_dt, bc.user_id, bc.user_ids, bc.account_id, IFNULL(a.account_name, '') AS account_name, bc.reg_user_id, u.user_name FROM tb_business_calendar bc JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = bc.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_account a ON TRIM(CAST(a.account_id AS CHAR)) = TRIM(CAST(bc.account_id AS CHAR)) WHERE DATE_FORMAT(bc.start_date, '%Y-%m') = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', #{month}) AND DATE_FORMAT(bc.end_date, '%Y-%m') = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', #{month}) ORDER BY bc.start_date ASC

SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(user_name SEPARATOR ', ') FROM tb_user WHERE user_id IN
#{id}
SELECT notice_idx, image_order, image_name, image_path, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_headoffice_notice_file WHERE notice_idx = #{notice_idx} ORDER BY image_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_headoffice_notice_file (notice_idx, image_order, image_name, image_path, reg_dt) VALUES (#{notice_idx}, #{image_order}, #{image_name}, #{image_path}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR))
mapper.select: SELECT e.idx, e.large_type, CASE e.large_type WHEN 1 THEN '법정 의무교육' WHEN 2 THEN '사외 교육' WHEN 3 THEN '사내 교육' ELSE '' END AS large_type_nm, e.title, e.user_id, u.user_name, CASE WHEN u.position = 0 THEN '대표' WHEN u.position = 1 THEN '팀장' WHEN u.position = 2 THEN '파트장' WHEN u.position BETWEEN 3 AND 7 THEN '매니저' ELSE '' END AS position_name, DATE_FORMAT(e.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_hr_education_file f WHERE f.idx = e.idx) AS file_cnt FROM tb_hr_education e JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = e.user_id WHERE e.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY e.idx DESC

SELECT e.idx, e.large_type, CASE e.large_type WHEN 1 THEN '법정 의무교육' WHEN 2 THEN '사외 교육' WHEN 3 THEN '사내 교육' ELSE '' END AS large_type_nm, e.title, e.content, e.user_id, u.user_name, CASE WHEN u.position = 0 THEN '대표' WHEN u.position = 1 THEN '팀장' WHEN u.position = 2 THEN '파트장' WHEN u.position BETWEEN 3 AND 7 THEN '매니저' ELSE '' END AS position_name, DATE_FORMAT(e.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_hr_education e JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = e.user_id WHERE e.idx = #{idx} AND e.del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_hr_education
idx,
large_type, title, content, user_id, reg_dt, update_dt, del_yn,
VALUES
#{idx},
#{large_type}, #{title}, #{content}, #{user_id}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), 'N',
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE large_type = #{large_type}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, update_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR)
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_hr_education SET del_yn = 'Y', update_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) WHERE idx = #{idx}
mapper.select: SELECT idx AS education_idx, image_order, image_name, image_path, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_hr_education_file WHERE idx = #{education_idx} ORDER BY image_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_hr_education_file (idx, image_order, image_name, image_path, reg_dt) VALUES (#{education_idx}, #{image_order}, #{image_name}, #{image_path}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR))
mapper.select: SELECT doc_id, doc_type, large_type, middle_type, small_type, doc_name, approval_position, DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i') AS end_time FROM tb_hr_evaluation_type WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY doc_id ASC

SELECT doc_id, doc_type, large_type, middle_type, small_type, doc_name, approval_position, del_yn, use_yn, DATE_FORMAT(start_time, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(end_time, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i') AS end_time FROM tb_hr_evaluation_type WHERE del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY doc_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_hr_evaluation_type (doc_type, large_type, middle_type, small_type, doc_name, approval_position, del_yn, use_yn, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{doc_type}, #{large_type}, #{middle_type}, #{small_type}, #{doc_name}, #{approval_position}, 'N', #{use_yn}, STR_TO_DATE(#{start_time}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s')NULL, STR_TO_DATE(#{end_time}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s')NULL)
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_hr_evaluation_type SET doc_type = #{doc_type}, large_type = #{large_type}, middle_type = #{middle_type}, small_type = #{small_type}, doc_name = #{doc_name}, approval_position = #{approval_position}, use_yn = #{use_yn}, start_time = STR_TO_DATE(#{start_time}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s')NULL, end_time = STR_TO_DATE(#{end_time}, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s')NULL WHERE doc_id = #{doc_id}
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.user_name, u.department, u.position, CASE u.department WHEN 0 THEN '대표' WHEN 2 THEN '회계팀' WHEN 3 THEN '인사팀' WHEN 4 THEN '영업팀' WHEN 5 THEN '운영팀' WHEN 6 THEN '개발팀' WHEN 8 THEN '급식사업부' WHEN 9 THEN '기획팀' ELSE '기타' END AS dept_name FROM tb_user u WHERE u.del_yn = 'N' AND u.department NOT IN (1, 7) ORDER BY u.department ASC, u.position ASC

SELECT k.idx, k.type, CASE k.type WHEN 1 THEN '총괄' WHEN 2 THEN '인사' WHEN 3 THEN '영업' WHEN 4 THEN '개발' WHEN 5 THEN '회계' WHEN 6 THEN '운영' WHEN 7 THEN '기획' ELSE '' END AS type_nm, e.user_id, u.user_name, u.department AS writer_department, u.position, CASE u.department WHEN 0 THEN '대표' WHEN 2 THEN '회계팀' WHEN 3 THEN '인사팀' WHEN 4 THEN '영업팀' WHEN 5 THEN '운영팀' WHEN 6 THEN '개발팀' WHEN 8 THEN '급식사업부' WHEN 9 THEN '기획팀' ELSE '기타' END AS dept_name, e.doc_type, et.large_type, et.middle_type, et.small_type, et.doc_name, et.approval_position, e.charge_sign, k.goal, k.measurement, k.weight, k.performance, k.content, e.tm_user, tm_u.user_name AS tm_user_name, e.tm_sign, DATE_FORMAT(e.tm_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS tm_dt, e.tm_opinion, e.hp_user, hp_u.user_name AS hp_user_name, e.hp_sign, DATE_FORMAT(e.hp_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS hp_dt, e.hp_opinion, e.hr_user, hr_u.user_name AS hr_user_name, e.hr_sign, DATE_FORMAT(e.hr_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS hr_dt, e.ceo_user, ceo_u.user_name AS ceo_user_name, e.ceo_sign, DATE_FORMAT(e.ceo_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ceo_dt, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(e.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS end_time, DATE_FORMAT(e.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_hr_evaluation e JOIN tb_hr_evaluation_kpi k ON k.document_id = e.document_id JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = e.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_user tm_u ON tm_u.user_id = e.tm_user LEFT JOIN tb_user hp_u ON hp_u.user_id = e.hp_user LEFT JOIN tb_user hr_u ON hr_u.user_id = e.hr_user LEFT JOIN tb_user ceo_u ON ceo_u.user_id = e.ceo_user LEFT JOIN tb_hr_evaluation_type et ON et.doc_type = e.doc_type AND DATE(et.start_time) = DATE(e.start_time) AND DATE(et.end_time) = DATE(e.end_time) AND et.del_yn = 'N' WHERE e.idx = #{idx} AND e.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY k.idx ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_hr_evaluation SET start_time = STR_TO_DATE(#{new_start_time}, '%Y-%m-%d'), end_time = STR_TO_DATE(#{new_end_time}, '%Y-%m-%d'), update_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) WHERE idx = #{idx} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_hr_evaluation (user_id, start_time, end_time, doc_type, charge_sign, tm_user, hp_user, hr_user, ceo_user, document_id, reg_dt, update_dt, del_yn) VALUES (#{user_id},
STR_TO_DATE(#{start_time}, '%Y-%m-%d') NULL ,
STR_TO_DATE(#{end_time}, '%Y-%m-%d') NULL ,
#{doc_type} NULL ,
#{charge_sign} NULL ,
#{tm_user} NULL ,
#{hp_user} NULL ,
#{hr_user} NULL ,
#{ceo_user} NULL ,
#{document_id} NULL , DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), 'N')
INSERT INTO tb_hr_evaluation_kpi (document_id, type, goal, measurement, weight, performance, content) VALUES (#{document_id}, #{type}, #{goal}, #{measurement}, #{weight}, #{performance}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT document_id) FROM tb_hr_evaluation WHERE doc_type = #{docType} AND DATE(reg_dt) = CURDATE() AND del_yn = 'N' AND document_id IS NOT NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_hr_evaluation SET del_yn = 'Y', update_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) WHERE idx = #{idx} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.select: SELECT notice_idx AS evaluation_idx, image_order, image_name, image_path, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_hr_evaluation_file WHERE notice_idx = #{evaluation_idx} ORDER BY image_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_hr_evaluation_file (notice_idx, image_order, image_name, image_path, reg_dt) VALUES (#{evaluation_idx}, #{image_order}, #{image_name}, #{image_path}, DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR))
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_hr_evaluation SET tm_sign = '4', tm_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), hp_read_dt = NULL, hr_read_dt = NULL, update_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) , tm_opinion = #{opinion} WHERE idx = #{idx} AND del_yn = 'N' AND IFNULL(tm_sign, '') NOT IN ('4')

UPDATE tb_hr_evaluation SET hp_sign = '4', hp_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), hr_read_dt = NULL, update_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) , hp_opinion = #{opinion} WHERE idx = #{idx} AND del_yn = 'N' AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(hp_sign, '') NOT IN ('4')

UPDATE tb_hr_evaluation SET hr_sign = '4', hr_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), user_read_dt = CASE WHEN IFNULL(ceo_user, '') = '' THEN NULL ELSE user_read_dt END, ceo_read_dt = CASE WHEN IFNULL(ceo_user, '') != '' THEN NULL ELSE ceo_read_dt END, update_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) WHERE idx = #{idx} AND del_yn = 'N' AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(hp_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(hp_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(hr_sign, '') NOT IN ('4')

UPDATE tb_hr_evaluation SET ceo_sign = '4', ceo_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR), user_read_dt = NULL, update_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) WHERE idx = #{idx} AND del_yn = 'N' AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(hp_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(hp_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(hr_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(hr_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') NOT IN ('4')
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT e.idx, e.user_id AS writer_id, u.user_name AS writer_name, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(e.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS end_time, '팀장결재요청' AS notify_type, 'KPI 평가 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', u.user_name, '] KPI 평가 팀장 확인이 필요합니다.') AS notify_message, DATE_FORMAT(e.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_hr_evaluation e JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = e.user_id WHERE e.tm_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(e.tm_sign, '') NOT IN ('4') AND e.del_yn = 'N'
UNION
SELECT e.idx, e.user_id AS writer_id, u.user_name AS writer_name, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(e.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS end_time, '실장확인요청' AS notify_type, 'KPI 평가 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', u.user_name, '] KPI 평가 실장 확인이 필요합니다.') AS notify_message, DATE_FORMAT(e.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_hr_evaluation e JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = e.user_id WHERE e.hp_user = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(e.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(e.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(e.hp_sign, '') NOT IN ('4') AND e.del_yn = 'N'
UNION
SELECT e.idx, e.user_id AS writer_id, u.user_name AS writer_name, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(e.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS end_time, '인사팀장결재요청' AS notify_type, 'KPI 평가 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', u.user_name, '] KPI 평가 인사팀장 확인이 필요합니다.') AS notify_message, DATE_FORMAT(e.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_hr_evaluation e JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = e.user_id WHERE e.hr_user = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(e.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(e.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(e.hp_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(e.hp_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(e.hr_sign, '') NOT IN ('4') AND e.del_yn = 'N'
UNION
SELECT e.idx, e.user_id AS writer_id, u.user_name AS writer_name, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(e.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS end_time, '대표확인요청' AS notify_type, 'KPI 평가 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', u.user_name, '] KPI 평가 대표 확인이 필요합니다.') AS notify_message, DATE_FORMAT(e.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_hr_evaluation e JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = e.user_id WHERE e.ceo_user = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(e.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(e.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(e.hp_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(e.hp_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(e.hr_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(e.hr_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(e.ceo_sign, '') NOT IN ('4') AND e.del_yn = 'N'
UNION
SELECT e.idx, e.user_id AS writer_id, u.user_name AS writer_name, DATE_FORMAT(e.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(e.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d') AS end_time, '확인완료' AS notify_type, 'KPI 평가 알림' AS notify_title, 'KPI 평가가 모든 확인 완료되었습니다' AS notify_message, DATE_FORMAT(e.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_hr_evaluation e JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = e.user_id WHERE e.user_id = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(e.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(e.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(e.hp_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(e.hp_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(e.hr_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(e.hr_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(e.ceo_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(e.ceo_sign, '') = '4') AND e.user_read_dt IS NULL AND e.del_yn = 'N'
) AS N ORDER BY N.reg_dt DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_hr_evaluation SET user_read_dt = CASE WHEN user_id = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '확인완료' THEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) ELSE user_read_dt END, tm_read_dt = CASE WHEN tm_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '팀장결재요청' THEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) ELSE tm_read_dt END, hp_read_dt = CASE WHEN hp_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '실장확인요청' THEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) ELSE hp_read_dt END, ceo_read_dt = CASE WHEN ceo_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '대표확인요청' THEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) ELSE ceo_read_dt END, hr_read_dt = CASE WHEN hr_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '인사팀장결재요청' THEN DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) ELSE hr_read_dt END, update_dt = DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 9 HOUR) WHERE idx = #{idx} AND del_yn = 'N' AND ( (user_id = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '확인완료') OR (tm_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '팀장결재요청') OR (hp_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '실장확인요청') OR (hr_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '인사팀장결재요청') OR (ceo_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '대표확인요청') )
